message:
perf(parser): intern identifier tokens across scratch parses

lex_identifier is on the per-token path for every identifier and keyword token.
This switches identifier and quoted-identifier tokens to Arc<str>, adds a
scratch-backed identifier interner reused across repeated parse calls, and keeps
keyword lookup allocation-free on ASCII bytes.

Microbench (/tmp/frankensqlite_parser_hot_path_bench*, 200000 iterations):
- before (cc593909): 887.2 ms mean
- after: 760.4 ms mean
- speedup: 1.17x (+16.7%)

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
 // Keywords are their own variants for O(1) matching in the parser.
 
 use fsqlite_ast::Span;
+use std::sync::Arc;
 
 /// A single token produced by the lexer.
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
@@ -38,10 +39,10 @@ pub enum TokenKind {
 
     // === Identifiers ===
     /// Unquoted identifier.
-    Id(String),
+    Id(Arc<str>),
     /// Quoted identifier (`"name"`, `[name]`, `` `name` ``).
     /// The bool is the EP_DblQuoted flag (true if double-quoted).
-    QuotedId(String, bool),
+    QuotedId(Arc<str>, bool),
 
     // === Variables / bind parameters ===
     /// `?` anonymous positional.
@@ -247,6 +248,8 @@ pub enum TokenKind {
 }
 
 impl TokenKind {
+    const MAX_KEYWORD_LEN: usize = "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP".len();
+
     /// Fast-path lookup for common SQL keywords directly on ASCII bytes.

     /// This avoids allocating an owned identifier string and an uppercased

+    /// Look up an identifier string to see if it's a keyword.

     /// Returns true if this is a keyword that can start a statement.
     /// Used by the parser for error recovery sync points.

@@ -620,7 +637,8 @@ impl TokenKind {
     pub fn to_sql(&self) -> String {
         match self {
             Self::Integer(i) => i.to_string(),
-            Self::OversizedInt(s) | Self::Id(s) | Self::Error(s) => s.clone(),

             Self::Float(f) => format!("{f}"),

             Self::Blob(b) => {
